problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
hypothesis: If Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting is applied to be, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
